## Summary / 概要

Briefly describe what this PR does.
简述此 PR 做了什么。

## Type / 类型

- [ ] feat: 新功能
- [ ] fix: 缺陷修复
- [ ] refactor: 重构
- [ ] docs: 文档更新
- [ ] chore: 构建/工具链

## Test Plan / 测试计划

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -x -q` passes (currently 139 tests)
- [ ] Manual test on affected pages (if frontend change)

## Changelog / 升级说明

Please add a bilingual entry to CHANGELOG.md.
请在 CHANGELOG.md 添加中英文双语条目。

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] No `llm_config.json` or API keys committed
- [ ] Version string updated if applicable
- [ ] Architecture doc updated if module structure changed
